title: FeatherSeat Mesh Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Premium ergonomic office chair with breathable mesh back and seat. Adjustable lumbar support, headrest, and 360° swivel for comfortable long coding sessions.

title: Boltora L-Shaped Wooden Computer Desk
description: Spacious L-shaped computer desk with sturdy steel frame and faux wood top. Provides ample workspace for dual monitors and accessories. Easy to assemble.

title: ViscoTech Dual Monitor Arm Stand
description: Heavy-duty adjustable dual monitor arm stand for two 27-inch monitors. Features clamp or grommet mounting, full motion tilt, and cable management clips.

title: TechType RGB Mechanical Keyboard
description: RGB backlit mechanical gaming keyboard with tactile switches and ergonomic keycaps. Features anti-ghosting, N-key rollover, and a detachable palm rest for comfort.

title: GripMax Wireless Gaming Mouse
description: Ergonomic wireless gaming mouse with adjustable DPI up to 16000. Features RGB lighting, silent click switches, and a lightweight design for smooth glide.

title: Silencia Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Over-ear Bluetooth headphones with active noise cancellation. Up to 40-hour battery life, comfortable protein-leather earcups, and built-in mic for calls.

title: Luminio LED Desk Lamp with USB
description: Adjustable LED desk lamp with touch control and built-in USB charging port. Three color modes and five brightness levels. Energy-efficient and sleek design.

title: TidyDesk Cable Organizer Kit
description: Complete cable management kit including clips, sleeves, and ties. Organize and hide cables under your desk for a neat workspace. Includes adhesive mounts and straps.

title: Frosti USB Laptop Cooling Pad
description: USB-powered laptop cooling pad with dual fans and adjustable height. Slim aluminum design compatible with 15-17 inch laptops. Helps prevent overheating under load.

title: FlexiFold Adjustable Laptop Stand
description: Portable foldable laptop stand with adjustable height and angle. Aluminum alloy construction with rubber feet for stability. Improves laptop ventilation and ergonomics.

title: Auralux Pro ANC Wireless Headphones
description: Premium over-ear headphones with hybrid active noise cancellation, deep bass drivers, and 35-hour battery backup. Soft memory-foam cushions for long coding sessions.

title: NovaBeat Studio Wireless Headphones
description: Lightweight studio-style Bluetooth headphones with immersive surround sound, fast USB-C charging, and foldable design for travel and work setups.

title: HyperGlide Pro Wireless Gaming Mouse
description: Ultra-lightweight wireless gaming mouse with adjustable DPI up to 16000, RGB side lighting, and ergonomic grip for long coding or gaming sessions.

title: ElevateX Ergo Aluminum Laptop Stand
description: Premium adjustable aluminum laptop stand with anti-slip silicone pads and open design for better airflow. Ideal for coding desks and long work sessions.

title: BrightPages A5 Hardcover Notebook
description: Premium A5-size hardcover notebook with high-quality lined pages. Features a built-in bookmark ribbon and elastic closure. Ideal for notes, journal, or bullet journaling.

title: WriteMate Complete Stationery Set
description: 12-piece study stationery kit including ballpoint pens, mechanical pencils, erasers, sharpener, ruler, and a zipper case. Colorful and durable supplies for students.

title: GlowMark Fluorescent Highlighter Set
description: Set of 6 fluorescent highlighters in assorted colors. Water-based ink that doesn’t bleed through pages. Ergonomic triangular barrel for comfortable grip during note-taking.

title: DeskBuddy Pen Holder & Organizer
description: Multi-compartment desk organizer made of wood. Stores pens, markers, and office supplies. Sleek design with a slot for phone or notes. Keeps your study desk tidy.

title: StudyBright LED Desk Lamp
description: Flexible LED study lamp with adjustable arm and touch-sensitive brightness control. Five lighting modes (warm to cool) and USB charging port. Energy-efficient and eye-friendly.

title: CalcPro Scientific Calculator
description: Scientific calculator with dual-line display, 240 functions including trig, log, and statistical calculations. Ideal for math and science students. Solar + battery powered.

title: EduGear Student Backpack
description: Durable 20L student backpack with padded laptop compartment (fits 15.6"), multiple pockets, and ergonomic shoulder straps. Water-resistant fabric and reinforced stitching.

title: TickTock Digital Alarm Clock
description: Digital alarm clock with LED display and dual alarm function. USB charging port and easy-snooze feature. Compact design and bright, adjustable time display.

title: HydroMate Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: 24oz reusable stainless steel water bottle with double-wall vacuum insulation. Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 hours. Leak-proof lid and sweat-free exterior.

title: SmartRise Bluetooth Alarm Clock
description: Modern smart alarm clock with Bluetooth speaker, LED display, and customizable alarms. Includes night light and phone charging support.

title: TravelMate Compact Alarm Clock
description: Lightweight and portable travel alarm clock with foldable stand and clear LCD display. Ideal for travel, study desks, and bedside use.

title: UrbanCarry Laptop Backpack
description: Modern 25L laptop backpack with padded compartment for 15.6" laptops, anti-theft pocket, USB charging port, and breathable back support. Ideal for college and daily travel.

title: CampusPro Student Backpack
description: Lightweight 23L student backpack with spacious compartments, padded shoulder straps, and water-resistant polyester fabric. Perfect for books, laptop, and daily essentials.

title: WritePro Smooth Ballpoint Pen Set
description: Pack of 10 smooth-writing ballpoint pens with quick-dry ink. Comfortable rubber grip and consistent ink flow for everyday writing, note-taking, and exams.

title: Orico 6-in-1 USB-C Multiport Hub
description: USB-C hub with 4K HDMI, 3 USB3.0 ports, SD/TF card slots, and Gigabit Ethernet. Plug-and-play design supports data transfer and 4K video output for laptops and phones.

title: VoltUp Qi Wireless Charger Pad
description: 15W Qi wireless charger pad compatible with iPhone and Android. Slim charging station with LED indicator and anti-slip design. Supports fast charging and case-friendly charging.

title: FlexiGuard Silicone Phone Case
description: Durable silicone phone case with raised edges for screen and camera protection. Flexible and slim design fits latest iPhone and Android models. Provides a comfortable anti-slip grip.

title: PowerPack 10000mAh Portable Charger
description: Compact 10000mAh power bank with dual USB outputs and fast charging support. Aluminum alloy body with built-in LED battery indicator. Charges smartphones and tablets on the go.

title: NanoGrip Bluetooth Mouse
description: Ergonomic Bluetooth mouse with adjustable DPI up to 2400. Silent click design and contoured body for comfortable use. Compatible with laptop, tablet, and PC without receiver.

title: ClearShield Tempered Glass Screen Protector (Pack of 2)
description: Two tempered glass screen protectors with anti-scratch and anti-fingerprint coating. Ultra-thin (0.33mm), 9H hardness, and bubble-free installation for smartphones.

title: SonicBass Bluetooth Earbuds
description: In-ear Bluetooth 5.0 earbuds with charging case. Provides up to 24 hours total playtime and intelligent touch controls. Noise isolation and comfortable silicone tips included.

title: FlexiLink USB-C to USB-A Charging Cable (1m)
description: High-quality braided 1m USB-C to USB-A cable for fast charging and data sync. Durable nylon braid with tangle-free design. Compatible with all USB-C smartphones and tablets.

title: CushionGuard 15-inch Laptop Sleeve
description: Padded laptop sleeve made of water-resistant neoprene. Fits 15-inch laptops snugly and protects from scratches and bumps. Slim form with smooth zipper closure.

title: SwiftClick Wireless Mouse
description: Compact wireless mouse with 1600 DPI precision sensor and silent click buttons. Lightweight design with USB nano receiver for smooth navigation on laptops and desktops.

title: ProTrack Ergonomic Mouse
description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI up to 3200 for smooth tracking. Designed with anti-slip grip and silent buttons, perfect for office and long working hours.

title: ChargeWave Fast Wireless Pad
description: 10W fast wireless charging pad compatible with Qi-enabled smartphones. Ultra-slim design with LED charging indicator and anti-slip rubber base for stable charging.

title: PowerNest Wireless Charging Stand
description: 15W Qi wireless charging stand with vertical design for easy viewing while charging. Compatible with Android and iPhone devices, with overheat protection and LED indicator.

title: BeatFlow Wireless Earbuds
description: True wireless Bluetooth earbuds with deep bass sound and fast pairing technology. Comes with compact charging case and touch control for music and calls.

title: ClearTune Noise Isolating Earbuds
description: Lightweight wireless earbuds with noise isolation and HD stereo sound. Features quick charging case and ergonomic design for comfortable long listening sessions.

title: DecoVibe Inspirational Sticker Pack
description: Set of 20 die-cut vinyl inspirational quote stickers. Waterproof and fade-resistant. Great for decorating laptops, notebooks, and study spaces with motivational messages.

title: RetroGo Vintage Travel Poster Collection
description: Pack of 5 high-quality retro travel posters featuring classic destinations. Printed on premium glossy paper. Perfect for wall decor in study or living room.

title: Stay Hungry Stay Foolish posters
description: Minimalist motivational wall poster featuring bold typography. Printed on matte finish poster paper. Inspirational quote design to personalize your study or workspace wall.

title: ZenGarden Floral Wall Decals
description: Set of reusable floral wall decals. Easy peel-and-stick application, non-toxic vinyl. Adds a touch of nature and color to any wall or furniture surface.

title: CityBeat Street Art Sticker Pack
description: Assorted pack of 30 graffiti and street art style vinyl stickers. Durable and weatherproof, perfect for laptops, skateboards, or urban decor.

title: CodeCat Laptop Sticker Kit
description: Set of 10 cat-themed tech stickers for laptops and tablets. Includes colorful vinyl decals of coding cats and gadgets. Sticker pack size fits notebooks and gadgets.

title: GalleryWall Retro Street Poster Set
description: Collection of 4 retro-styled street posters (16x24 inches) featuring city and travel motifs. Printed on thick matte paper with vintage color tones.

title: PopCulture Comic Sticker Pack
description: Pack of 20 pop-culture themed stickers (anime and comic style). Weatherproof vinyl stickers, ideal for personalizing gadgets or notebooks with cartoon art.

title: Dream Big Motivational Poster
description: Inspirational wall poster with bold 'Dream Big Work Hard' typography. Printed on premium matte poster paper with vibrant colors, ideal for study rooms, offices, and workspaces.

title: PixelPop Laptop Sticker Pack
description: Fun pack of 25 colorful laptop stickers featuring tech, gaming, and pop culture themes. Made with waterproof vinyl and strong adhesive for long-lasting use.

title: Focus & Hustle Wall Poster
description: Minimalist motivational poster with 'Focus and Hustle' quote design. Printed on high-quality matte poster paper, perfect for study desks, home offices, or creative workspaces.

title: NatureBloom Tree Wall Decal
description: Elegant tree wall decal with birds and leaves design. Made from removable vinyl, easy to apply and reposition without damaging walls. Perfect for living rooms and bedrooms.

title: ColorSplash Butterfly Wall Decals
description: Vibrant butterfly wall decal set with colorful designs. Made from eco-friendly vinyl with peel-and-stick application. Ideal for bedrooms, kids rooms, and creative spaces.
